data.title: BuildSubmarines.com and RFK Racing Bring Hands-On STEM Learning to the Talladega Fan Zone
data.description: In Talladega, Alabama on April 29, 2026, BuildSubmarines.com has partnered with RFK Racing and the Talladega No. 60 car to introduce hands-on STEM education at the Talladega Fan Zone. This initiative aims to engage students and families through interactive activities, fostering connections to practical career opportunities.

JAPAN'S INDUSTRIAL PRODUCTION DECLINED 0.5% MONTH-ON-MONTH IN MARCH (PRELIMINARY), FALLING SHORT OF THE 1.1% FORECAST AND FOLLOWING A 2.0% DROP IN THE PRIOR MONTH, WHILE YEAR-ON-YEAR OUTPUT ROSE 2.3%, EDGING ABOVE THE 2.2% ESTIMATE AND UP FROM 0.4% PREVIOUSLY.

data.title: These Mag 7 Stocks Report. Google Leads 21 Prospects Onto Top Stock Watchlists.
data.description: The latest update on IBD's top-performing stock lists reveals the addition and removal of certain stocks. Among the identified stocks, Google stands out as a top performer, leading a group of 21 promising prospects onto the top stock watchlists. The updated lists highlight the current market trends and potential investment opportunities for shareholders.

data.title: EverGen Infrastructure Reports Q4 & Year End 2025 Results
data.description: EverGen Infrastructure Corp. announced its audited financial results for Q4 2025 on April 29, 2026. Revenues showed a significant increase of 34% to $4.2 million compared to $3.2 million in Q4 2024. However, there was a 17% decrease in fiscal year revenues, totaling $11 million. All financial figures are reported in Canadian dollars and have been prepared following IFRS Accounting Standards.

data.title: Emma, the Gut Health Formula Everyone's Talking About, Lands at Target Nationwide
data.description: Enclave Bioactives revealed today that its popular gut health formula, Emma, can now be purchased at Target stores and Target.com across the country as of April 29, 2026. This expansion allows millions of consumers nationwide to access one of the most acclaimed supplements in the United States. Emma offers a variety of health benefits and has been widely discussed for its effectiveness.

data.title: Allied Announces First-Quarter Results
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Allied Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: "AP.UN") reported its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company shared its results without specifying the details.

data.title: Dreame Technology's "DREAME NEXT" Smart Wearables: Smart Ring Comes Under the Spotlight
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in San Francisco, Dreame Technology, a prominent company in smart home appliances and health technology, organized the "DREAME NEXT" themed launch event at the iconic Palace of Fine Arts. The event served as a platform for Dreame to introduce their latest innovations and set new standards in the industry. This event signifies a significant step for Dreame as they strive to revolutionize the future of smart home technology and wellness.

data.title: Market Defense Expands Capabilities with Acquisition of Knoza by Parent Company D2E Labs
data.description: Seattle, April 29, 2026 - Market Defense revealed its recent expansion by acquiring Knoza under its parent company, D2E Labs. This acquisition highlights Market Defense's goal to enhance marketplace operations through connectivity and effectiveness.

data.title: NEXE Innovations shares Q3 2026 results and business update.
data.description: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate has increased by 2.5% compared to last year, with the current rate standing at 8.7%. The report also highlighted that the number of new job openings has decreased by 15% recently. Additionally, the average income of workers has seen a slight rise of 3.2%, reaching $52,000 annually. Overall, the job market appears to be experiencing significant changes, with more people seeking employment opportunities amid these shifts.

data.title: Heather Shepherd Announces Expansion into International Luxury Market with Cabo San Lucas Listing
data.description: Houston-based entrepreneur Heather Shepherd, the creator of HS Homes Houston at Douglas Elliman Texas, revealed on April 29, 2026, her plans to extend her high-end real estate offerings globally by acquiring a top-tier property in Pedregal, Cabo San Lucas. This marks a significant milestone for her business as it ventures into the international market.
